name: Versioned-data convergence
intent: schema_version everywhere, every read migration-aware, every resync honest, versions converge on write. Members: TASK-073 (FGAP-099 block schema_version stamping), FGAP-105 (write-time config version convergence), FGAP-107 (raw config readers to the migration-aware loader), issue-005 (same-version resync re-validates), issue-003 (update over-refusal), TASK-072 (FGAP-097 config-schema additive gate), FGAP-092 (update transactional boundary), FGAP-076 (update partial-application legibility). Lane A spine position 1: ungated, first — defines the envelope everything downstream stamps and reads. FGAP-105 fold-locus (writeConfigForDir vs generic writeTypedFile) is decided at this phase plan step, before TASK-057 dispatches.
goal: FEAT-010 criteria 3, 4, and 6 met; no reader sees a different shape than the loader; persisted schema_version converges to current on write; update outcomes are legible and transactional.
